'''鈭歵-y-sh-zh''' ('''katayshezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wop|wop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-sh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wop|wop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-y-sh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| katayshezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitayshezhoko|thitayshezhoko]] || [[word:jitayshezhoko|jitayshezhoko]] || [[word:shitayshezhoko|shitayshezhoko]] || [[word:kitayshezhoko|kitayshezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutayshezhoko|thuthutayshezhoko]] || [[word:jujutayshezhoko|jujutayshezhoko]] || [[word:shushutayshezhoko|shushutayshezhoko]] || [[word:kukutayshezhoko|kukutayshezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotayshezhoko|thotayshezhoko]] || [[word:jotayshezhoko|jotayshezhoko]] || [[word:shotayshezhoko|shotayshezhoko]] || [[word:kotayshezhoko|kotayshezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙tayshezhoko|th忙tayshezhoko]] || [[word:j忙tayshezhoko|j忙tayshezhoko]] || [[word:sh忙tayshezhoko|sh忙tayshezhoko]] || [[word:k忙tayshezhoko|k忙tayshezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatayshezhoko|thathatayshezhoko]] || [[word:jajatayshezhoko|jajatayshezhoko]] || [[word:shashatayshezhoko|shashatayshezhoko]] || [[word:kakatayshezhoko|kakatayshezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatayshezhoko|thatayshezhoko]] || [[word:jatayshezhoko|jatayshezhoko]] || [[word:shatayshezhoko|shatayshezhoko]] || [[word:katayshezhoko|katayshezhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatayshezhoko|thatayshezhoko]] || [[word:jatayshezhoko|jatayshezhoko]] || [[word:shatayshezhoko|shatayshezhoko]] || [[word:katayshezhoko|katayshezhoko]]
|}
